name: neg: bare imperative command
text: User: 跑一下测试

name: neg: quoted CLI output
text: Assistant: 插件已更新完毕。CLI 输出：✔ Plugin "asaki-memory" updated from 1.3.1 to 1.3.2 for scope user. Restart to apply changes.

name: neg: quoted source/prompt string
text: Assistant: FORGET_SIGNALS 正则用于识别类似 "forget that I prefer dark mode" 这种表达，命中后转交 LLM 处理为 delete action。

name: neg: assistant's own next-step question
text: Assistant: 要不要跟上次一样：commit → push → bump 版本号 → claude plugin update 刷新本地缓存？

name: neg: original production false-positive (short user command)
text: User: 刷新并再次验证

name: pos: explicit user preference
text: User: 以后都用 fish shell 的环境变量文件存密钥，别写进 zshrc

name: pos: assistant completed bug-fix summary
text: Assistant: 根因排查出来了：sketchybar 的 padding_right 从 4 改成 12 之后图标不再贴边挤压，已验证生效。

name: pos: explicit forget request
text: User: forget that I prefer dark mode

name: neg: assistant quoting its own newly-added prompt example while explaining it
text: Assistant: 现在 prompt 里加了新的 few-shot 正例，比如 User: 以后都用 pnpm，不要用 npm 这种输入应该被正确抽取成用户偏好。跑了回归测试，8/8 全过。

name: neg: assistant's own question buried inside a longer explanation
text: Assistant: 建好了，eval:extraction 脚本已经能跑。要不要现在建这个 eval 文件？我建议现在建，因为能把踩过的坑固化成回归用例。

name: neg: bare next-step question after a status update
text: Assistant: 推送完了，origin/main 已经同步。要 commit + push 吗？

name: neg: user's exploratory question, not a stated goal or decision
text: User: 现在我想根据以后的记忆慢慢训练这个记忆系统，你觉得有必要么？

name: pos: system/dotfiles troubleshooting outside a project still worth flagging
text: Assistant: karabiner 配置里 caps lock 映射成 escape 后误触问题解决了，已验证生效，这是 dotfiles 仓库里的全局按键设置。

name: pos: problem-then-resolution pair still worth flagging
text:
User: 记忆系统漏掉了一条关键信息，关于缓存过期时间的配置项。
Assistant: 已经把这条信息补全到对应的记忆里了，缓存过期时间统一改成 300 秒。

name: neg: real production failure - delta ends on an open question, model tried to answer it instead of classifying (without --json-schema)
text: Assistant: 抓到了一个逻辑缺口。整理一下现状：任务书第50行渗透率是主指标候选，第51行护栏清单里没有渗透率，但primary-metric-argument.md第18行说"已定为护栏指标"是超前表述，guardrail-metrics.md护栏指标清单中根本没有渗透率。结论：earlier的说法不准确，这条需要改。要不要现在改这两处，把缺口补上？

name: neg: real production failure - self-referential delta about the classifier/throttle mechanism itself, model produced rambling prose instead of JSON (without --json-schema)
text: Assistant: 節流仍在生效：上一次分類器實際運行是17:22:28，距現在只過了73秒，還差227秒才能超過300秒窗口。17:14那條多行classifier.log已被判定為JSON解析失敗，沒有寫入.classifier.reported，會在下一次分類器運行時被拋棄。修復後的脚本在下一輪真正觸發時會生效。主公發下一條消息，這一輪Stop結束時，如果時間已超過300秒窗口，就會用修復後的版本跑分類器。

name: neg: one-off push status is not durable
text: Assistant: 已将变更推送至 origin/main，提交为 8df25dd，并通过敏感信息检查。

name: neg: generic technical trivia is not a personal or project memory
text: Assistant: Node.js new URL().hostname 对 IPv6 loopback 返回 '[::1]'。

name: pos: site-specific scraping learning is durable but project-scoped
text: Assistant: 点点数据的 App 详情页是 JS SPA，WebFetch 抓不到价格，后续改用官方 API。

name: pos: removed package is durable current project state
text: Assistant: 已从 Pi 配置中彻底移除 Ponytail 包、extension、skills 和配置引用，并通过 TypeScript 检查。

name: neg: vague commit fragment has no durable context
text: Assistant: type: fix

name: neg: transient UI status
text: Assistant: Music playing now

name: pos: superseded intermediate config retains only final state
text: Assistant: Herdr 中运行 Yazi 时先强制使用 Chafa；后续确认 Herdr 已支持 Kitty graphics，撤销 Chafa 并恢复 Kgp。

name: pos: machine-local fish secret path is project-scoped
text: Assistant: 用户偏好：环境变量/API密钥统一存放在 ~/.config/fish/conf.d/api_keys.local.fish（该文件已 gitignore，用 set -x / set -gx 语法）。不要写入 ~/.config/fish/config.fish 或 ~/.zshrc（用户用 fish shell，非 zsh/bash）。以后任何需要给 shell 加密钥/环境变量的场景，都应写入这个文件。

name: pos: cross-project scratchpad preference stays concise and global
text: Assistant: 用户偏好：周会汇报等一次性使用的文档产物不要写入项目仓库目录，放 scratchpad/临时目录即可；项目目录只留正式产出与治理文档。

name: pos: concrete dotfiles layout outcome is project-scoped
text: Assistant: 修复：paneru四边padding 4→10，配对齐sketchybar左侧10px边距。

name: pos: overlong app implementation is compressed and project-scoped
text: Assistant: In ~/.config sketchybar config, WiFi and volume clicks were changed to SketchyBar custom popups backed by sketchybar/plugins/status_popup.sh. WiFi popup lists preferred/saved networks and uses networksetup -setairportnetwork to switch; Bluetooth popup lists devices from system_profiler and toggles paired device connections via an inline Swift IOBluetooth call. macOS 26 may redact current/nearby SSIDs, so the popup falls back to '已连接（SSID 被系统隐藏）' when link is active but SSID is unavailable.

name: neg: one-off Claude Design API procedure dump
text: Assistant: Claude Design 画布页（.dc.html）不在 DesignSync MCP 文件树里（get_file 404）。浏览器登录态下可直接调 Omelette API：读取 GetFile，写回用 UploadFile，DeleteFile 删文件；大段 HTML 下载用 Blob+anchor，上传方向页内 fetch 后再 SHA-256 对齐本地。

name: neg: incomplete Herdr preference lacks standalone meaning
text: Assistant: 用户希望不使用嵌套并复用同一个 herdr 进程和 server。

name: neg: transient manual Ghostty window adjustment
text: Assistant: 用户决定调整 Ghostty 窗口高度以匹配其他应用的布局，手动拖高或修改终端行数以撑满额外底部缺口。

name: pos: mentor-specific reporting conventions are project-scoped
text: Assistant: 周会每项目 3–5 行，与豪哥日报区分；临时汇报放 scratchpad。

name: pos: Claude Code delivery behavior is app-specific and project-scoped
text: Assistant: Claude Code 的交付文本必须放在回合最后，否则后续工具调用可能使文本不展示。

name: neg: vague optimization intention is not a completed decision
text: Assistant: 用户希望针对技能和工具进行优化，列出推荐项并决定是否禁用。
